response.justification: Strong, versatile senior engineer with relevant geospatial experience (GISCollective) and high-performance systems background at Sociomantic with DLang, but the role demands modern C++ or Rust as a primary stack. Direct C++ experience is limited to a brief 2014-2015 stint at National Instruments, and there is no Rust on the resume. Recent work has been predominantly TypeScript/Node.js. Could be a fit if the team accepts strong systems generalists willing to ramp on C++, otherwise a stretch.
strengths: Geospatial/GIS domain experience via GISCollective and Green Map work
High-throughput, low-latency systems experience at Sociomantic with async I/O and fibers
Strong testing/TDD discipline and willingness to work across the full stack
concerns: Modern commercial C++ experience is minimal and roughly a decade old
No Rust experience listed as an alternative
Recent years focused on TypeScript/Node.js rather than systems-level languages required for the role
